name: core
desc: 🎮 TypeScript game numeric engine for RPG & strategy games. Zero dependencies, type-safe formula parsing, battle system simulation, and expression evaluation. …
descFull: 🎮 TypeScript game numeric engine for RPG & strategy games. Zero dependencies, type-safe formula parsing, battle system simulation, and expression evaluation.  基于 TypeScript 的游戏数值引擎，专为 RPG 和策略游戏设计。零依赖、类型安全的公式解析、战斗系统模拟和表达式计算。
